file_insights.purpose: Core app state and LogTail mode logic
changes: Added 8 new fields to App struct for LogTail state management: log_scroll, log_follow, log_tail_card_id, log_stdout_pos, log_stderr_pos, log_stdout_incomplete, log_stderr_incomplete
Implemented enter_log_tail() to initialize LogTail mode with existing log content (last 200 lines)
Implemented exit_log_tail() to clean up tailing state
Implemented poll_log_files() called on each tick to perform incremental polling
Added read_log_chunk() function implementing newline-gated streaming with 6 unit tests
file_insights.key_patterns: Newline-gated streaming (bytes buffered, only complete lines emitted); incremental file polling with position tracking; file truncation detection

changes: Implemented navigation: ↑/k scroll up, ↓/j scroll down, f toggle follow mode, c clear, Esc exit
Modified ActionPopup to call app.enter_log_tail() instead of just setting mode
file_insights.key_patterns: vim-style navigation (j/k), follow mode toggle, scroll position tracking with follow mode disabling

changes: Full-height overlay widget replacing body zone
Renders log buffer with scroll tracking and follow mode
Shows card ID in header with [ FOLLOW ] indicator
Footer legend: j/k scroll, f follow, c clear, Esc exit
file_insights.key_patterns: Overlay-style widget; ratatui Paragraph with calculated scroll offset; stateful rendering based on follow mode

patterns_discovered.description: Bytes appended to incomplete buffer; only complete lines (\n-terminated) extracted and emitted. Partial lines remain in buffer for next poll cycle. Prevents partial ANSI escape sequence rendering flicker.
patterns_discovered.implementation: read_log_chunk() with incomplete String buffer, find('\n') extraction
patterns_discovered.applicability: Any streaming log UI needing real-time updates without flicker

patterns_discovered.pattern: Incremental file polling with position tracking
patterns_discovered.description: Track file position (bytes read) across poll cycles. Seek to position, read delta, advance position. Allows efficient polling without re-reading entire file.
patterns_discovered.implementation: log_stdout_pos, log_stderr_pos fields; fs::seek(SeekFrom::Start) before read
patterns_discovered.applicability: Log tailing, metrics collection, any append-only log consumption

patterns_discovered.description: When file_len < pos (e.g. log rotation), reset pos=0 and clear incomplete buffer. Prevents seeking past EOF or delivering stale content.
patterns_discovered.implementation: Check metadata.len() < pos at poll start
patterns_discovered.applicability: Production logs with rotation, temporary files

patterns_discovered.description: Boolean flag disables manual scroll when user navigates; auto-scroll resume on 'f' key. Prevents position fighting when new content arrives during scroll.
patterns_discovered.implementation: log_follow flag set false on scroll key, toggled via 'f' key

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: UTF-8 boundary handling in newline-gated streaming
gotchas_discovered.detail: Multi-byte UTF-8 sequences may split across poll boundaries. String::from_utf8_lossy() used to handle incomplete bytes gracefully; invalid sequences replaced with U+FFFD.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Rely on from_utf8_lossy() and store partial lines in incomplete buffer across cycles

gotchas_discovered.detail: Log rotation (or explicit truncation) makes stored position invalid. Seeking to pos > file_len may fail or return stale content from new file.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Check metadata.len() vs pos at poll start; reset pos=0 if file shrunk

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Incomplete lines lost if app exits during partial line
gotchas_discovered.detail: incomplete buffers not persisted; if card selection changes mid-line, partial content is discarded (acceptable for TUI, notable for audit logs).
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Current design is acceptable for interactive TUI; document that incomplete lines on exit are lost

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Follow mode fighting with manual scroll
gotchas_discovered.detail: If follow mode on and new content arrives, auto-scroll offset may jump while user is scrolling, causing disorientation.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Follow mode disabled on any ↑/↓ key; user must press 'f' to resume auto-scroll

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Two independent position trackers (stdout/stderr) can desync
gotchas_discovered.detail: If one log file fills much faster than the other, poll cycles may see out-of-order lines from different streams.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Current design acceptable (logs merged by insertion order); note in docs that events may appear out of order across streams

approach_outcome.summary: Implemented full LogTail overlay mode with newline-gated streaming, incremental file polling, and follow-mode auto-scroll. All input handling wired, rendering complete, 6 unit tests added for read_log_chunk().
key_achievements: read_log_chunk() function provides reusable newline-gated streaming logic with file truncation handling
App state cleanly separates LogTail concerns: log_scroll (position), log_follow (auto-scroll), log_tail_card_id (current card), position/incomplete buffers per stream
Input handling fully specified: vim-style nav (j/k), follow toggle (f), clear (c), exit (Esc)
on_tick() integration: polls log files only when in LogTail mode (250ms cadence), no overhead in Normal mode
6 unit tests cover: complete lines, incomplete line buffering, multi-poll completion, missing files, truncation, no-new-data cases
test_coverage: read_log_chunk_handles_missing_file — validates graceful missing file handling

recommendations.recommendation: Extract common stdout/stderr polling into helper function to reduce duplication
recommendations.detail: poll_log_files() calls read_log_chunk() twice with identical pattern; could parameterize as poll_stream(path, pos_field, incomplete_field)

recommendations.recommendation: Add metrics for poll latency and log buffer memory usage
recommendations.detail: Track time spent in poll_log_files() per tick; warn if buffer exceeds threshold (e.g. >1MB)

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test for large log files (>10MB) to verify memory efficiency
recommendations.detail: Ensure read_log_chunk() does not load entire file into memory, only buffered delta

recommendations.recommendation: Display poll latency or byte rate in LogTail footer
recommendations.detail: Users monitoring slow-moving logs appreciate feedback that tailing is active (e.g. '↓ 2.3 KB/s' in footer)

recommendations.recommendation: Document newline-gated streaming pattern for future contributors
recommendations.detail: Add code comment explaining why incomplete lines are buffered and when they are emitted; note UTF-8 handling assumptions
